title: OnlyFast
description: Optimize your game without adding extra stuff.
body:
**Have you ever wonder if there is any modpack that optimizes the game while not adding extra annoying stuff? So this is for you! 🫵**

![OnlyFast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1333e4cf77ed6a7d8619d27e593177a29138fc4b_0.webp)

OnlyFast is an optimization modpack that aims to not altering the vanilla experience of the game, while you get a fancy FPS boost on the most devices, powerful or weak!

## 🌟Features🌟
  
> - Smoother general performace 🚀
> - Better chunk performance 🧩
> - Lower memory usage 📉
> - Entity culling 🚗
> - Faster block entities 📦
> - Faster resource load 🔄️
> - Faster language reload 🌎
> - Smoother MMO experience 🏃‍♂️‍➡️
> - Smoother server load 🛜
> - Blocky/fast bubble columns 🫧 (Toggable in video config)
> - Better background load 🏖️
> - ... And more!

<details>
<summary>⚙️Included mods⚙️</summary>
  
- [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [**Entity Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [**C2ME**](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [**Dynamic FPS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [**Blocky Bubbles**](https://modrinth.com/mod/blocky-bubbles)
- [**Async**](https://modrinth.com/mod/async)
- [**lazy-language-loader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazy-language-loader)
- [**Fast Server Pings**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastserverpings)
- [**Very Many Players**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)
- [**ImmediatelyFast**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [**ModernFix-mVUS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus)
- [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [**Immersive Optimization**](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-optimization)
- [**Worldthreader**](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldthreader)
- [**BadOptimizations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- [**NoisiumForked**](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked)
- [**ScalableLux**](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
- [**Not Enough Crashes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes)
